title: Zone Process Calibration
description: Schema for `zone.process_calibration.{generic,solution_fill,tank_recirc,irrigation}` namespaces. Source: ZoneProcessCalibrationDefaults::forMode. Schema version 1.

ec_gain_per_ml.description: EC change (mS/cm) per 1 ml of EC nutrient injected.

ph_up_gain_per_ml.description: pH increase per 1 ml of pH-up reagent.

ph_down_gain_per_ml.description: pH decrease per 1 ml of pH-down reagent (stored positive).

ph_per_ec_ml.description: Cross-coupling: pH shift per 1 ml of EC nutrient (usually slightly negative).

ec_per_ph_ml.description: Cross-coupling: EC shift per 1 ml of pH reagent.

meta.description: Free-form metadata. Compiler may write empty array `[]` instead of `{}` (PHP ambiguity); both accepted.

valid_from.description: Optional lifecycle timestamp written by compiler from pump_calibrations table.

valid_to.description: Optional lifecycle timestamp written by compiler from pump_calibrations table.

is_active.description: Optional active flag from pump_calibrations table.

updated_at.description: Optional update timestamp from pump_calibrations table.

$comment: AT LEAST ONE of {ec_gain_per_ml, ph_up_gain_per_ml, ph_down_gain_per_ml} must be > 0 for this calibration to be useful. This is enforced in the Pydantic loader, not at the JSON Schema level (a non-zero disjunction constraint would require allOf+anyOf with enumerated value combinations).
